title: Capsule
description: Schema for memory and context capsules generated by the memory fabric arm

modulo.description: Module or sub-system this capsule relates to

atividade.description: Activity description performed during this capsule's context window

comentarios.description: Additional user or system comments regarding the activity

ia_origem.description: The AI model or system that generated this capsule

contexto_adicional.description: Flexible field for additional state, references, or telemetry
